languages.text: Путь Вольному Торговцу преградили баррикады. Но нет ничего, с чем не справилась бы добрая порция фузелина... или танк.
The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.
languages.original_text: Путь Вольному Торговцу преградили баррикады. Но нет ничего, с чем не справилась бы добрая порция фузелина... или танк.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader's way is barred by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a good amount of fyceline... or a tank can't clear.
The Rogue Trader's way is barred by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a good amount of fyceline... or a tank can't clear.
The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.
The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

languages.text: Der Weg {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} wird durch Barrikaden versperrt. Glücklicherweise nichts, was man mit Fycelin oder einem Panzer nicht regeln könnte.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

traits.locale_text: Der Weg {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} wird durch Barrikaden versperrt. Glücklicherweise nichts, was man mit Fycelin oder einem Panzer nicht regeln könnte.

languages.text: Des barricades empêchent {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} d'avancer. Fort heureusement, ces obstacles ne résisteront pas à l'utilisation de fyceline... ou d'un char.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

traits.locale_text: Des barricades empêchent {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} d'avancer. Fort heureusement, ces obstacles ne résisteront pas à l'utilisation de fyceline... ou d'un char.

languages.text: 路障挡住了行商浪人的去路。幸运的是，只要有足够的炸药——或者一辆坦克——就没有扫不平的路障。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

traits.locale_text: 路障挡住了行商浪人的去路。幸运的是，只要有足够的炸药——或者一辆坦克——就没有扫不平的路障。

languages.text: El camino de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente está obstruido por una serie de barricadas. Por suerte, no es nada que no pueda despejarse con suficiente fycelina... o un tanque.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

traits.locale_text: El camino de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente está obstruido por una serie de barricadas. Por suerte, no es nada que no pueda despejarse con suficiente fycelina... o un tanque.

languages.text: フリートレーダーの行く手はバリケードに阻まれた。しかし、フセリンで対処できないことはない......戦車でもいい。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader's path was blocked by barricades. But nothing a good dose of fuselin couldn't handle..... or a tank.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'in yolu barikatlarla kapatılmış. Neyse ki yeterli miktarda fiselin veya bir tank ile temizlenemeyecek hiçbir şey yoktur.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader's way is blocked by barricades. Fortunately, there is nothing a sufficient amount of fyceline — or a tank — cannot clear.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'in yolu barikatlarla kapatılmış. Neyse ki yeterli miktarda fiselin veya bir tank ile temizlenemeyecek hiçbir şey yoktur.
